title: SessionProfile
description: Reusable session profile — defines what a CNS work session loads, can do, and produces.

capacity.description: Skills, MCP tools, and endpoints pre-allowed for this profile.

artifact_type.description: Primary output of this session type (e.g. 'ideas', 'code', 'node-planning-file').

agent.description: Optional bound agent definition (inline or $ref to a file in schemas/agents/).
